templates.template:
#!/bin/sh # auto-generated by StaticRoute service (utility.py) # NOTE: this service must be customized to be of any use # Below are samples that you can uncomment and edit. #ip route add 10.9.8.0/24 via 100.64.0.1
ip -6 addr add 2001:0:0:FF::2/127 dev eth0 ip -6 addr add FD00:0:0:FF::2/127 dev eth0 ip -6 addr add 2001:0:0:FF::4/127 dev eth1 ip -6 addr add FD00:0:0:FF::4/127 dev eth1
# default hacia internet, bloques internos hacia R4 ip route add default via 100.64.0.1 dev eth2 ip -6 route add 2001::/56 via 2001:0:0:ff::3 dev eth0 ip -6 route add FD00::/48 via FD00:0:0:ff::3 dev eth0
ip6tables -t filter -A FORWARD -o eth2 -s fd00::/48 -j DROP
ip tunnel add tnl mode sit local 100.64.0.2 remote 100.64.1.2 dev eth2 sudo ip link set tnl up ip -6 route add default dev tnl

#!/bin/sh # auto-generated by StaticRoute service (utility.py) # NOTE: this service must be customized to be of any use # Below are samples that you can uncomment and edit.
ip -6 addr add 2001:0:0:FF::8/127 dev eth0 ip -6 addr add FD00:0:0:FF::8/127 dev eth0 ip -6 addr add 2001:0:0:FF::A/127 dev eth1 ip -6 addr add FD00:0:0:FF::A/127 dev eth1 ip -6 addr add 2001:0:0:FF::3/127 dev eth2 ip -6 addr add FD00:0:0:FF::3/127 dev eth2 ip -6 addr add 2001:0:0:FF::6/127 dev eth3 ip -6 addr add FD00:0:0:FF::6/127 dev eth3
# default hacia R2, redes infra a las que no esta conectado hacia R5, dc hacia R1, demás redes hacia r5 ip -6 route add default via 2001:0:0:FF::2 dev eth2 ip -6 route add 2001:0:0:FF::/64 via 2001:0:0:FF::9 dev eth0 ip -6 route add FD00:0:0:FF::/64 via FD00:0:0:FF::9 dev eth0 ip -6 route add 2001::/64 via 2001:0:0:ff::B dev eth1 ip -6 route add FD00::/64 via FD00:0:0:ff::B dev eth1 ip -6 route add 2001::/64 via 2001:0:0:ff::B dev eth1 ip -6 route add FD00::/64 via FD00:0:0:ff::B dev eth1 ip -6 route add 2001:0:0:1::/64 via 2001:0:0:ff::9 dev eth0 ip -6 route add FD00:0:0:1::/64 via FD00:0:0:ff::9 dev eth0 ip -6 route add 2001:0:0:2::/63 via 2001:0:0:ff::9 dev eth0 ip -6 route add FD00:0:0:2::/63 via FD00:0:0:ff::9 dev eth0 ip -6 route add FD00:0:0:4::/63 via FD00:0:0:ff::9 dev eth0
# DEFAULT HACIA R3 SI LOS PAQUETES SON TCP, CONFIGURO TABLA NRO 3 ip -6 route add default via 2001:0:0:FF::7 dev eth3 table tcp # destino intranet uso main ip -6 rule add pri 29 to 2001::/56 table main # destinos fuera de intranet protocolo tcp uso tabla 3 ip -6 rule add pri 30 ipproto tcp table tcp

#!/bin/sh # auto-generated by StaticRoute service (utility.py) # NOTE: this service must be customized to be of any use # Below are samples that you can uncomment and edit.
ip -6 addr add 2001:0:0:FF::E/127 dev eth0 ip -6 addr add FD00:0:0:FF::E/127 dev eth0 ip -6 addr add 2001:0:0:1::1/64 dev eth1 ip -6 addr add FD00:0:0:1::1/64 dev eth1 ip -6 addr add 2001:0:0:FF::9/127 dev eth2 ip -6 addr add FD00:0:0:FF::9/127 dev eth2 ip -6 addr add 2001:0:0:FF::D/127 dev eth3 ip -6 addr add FD00:0:0:FF::D/127 dev eth3
# default hacia R4, ventas hacia R6, admin hacia R3 ip -6 route add default via 2001:0:0:FF::8 dev eth2 ip -6 route add 2001:0:0:2::/64 via 2001:0:0:ff::f dev eth0 ip -6 route add FD00:0:0:2::/63 via FD00:0:0:ff::f dev eth0 ip -6 route add FD00:0:0:4::/63 via FD00:0:0:ff::c dev eth3
ip -6 route add 2001:0:0:FF::4/127 via 2001:0:0:FF::c dev eth3 #ip -6 route add FD00:0:0:FF::4/127 via FD00:0:0:FF::c dev eth3
# origen wguest uso tabla 5 ip -6 rule add priority 10 from 2001:0:0:1::/64 table wguest ip -6 rule add priority 20 from fd00:0:0:1::/64 table wguest
#tabla wguest (origen w-guest) #dest dns y web en dc por R4 ip -6 route add 2001::200:ff:fe00:a3/128 via 2001:0:0:FF::8 dev eth2 table wguest ip -6 route add 2001::200:ff:fe00:a4/128 via 2001:0:0:FF::8 dev eth2 table wguest
#resto de destinos intranet se impide ip -6 route add prohibit 2001::/56 table wguest ip -6 route add prohibit fd00::/48 table wguest
#envio paquetes por defecto hacia r3 ip -6 route add default via 2001:0:0:FF::C dev eth3 table wguest

#!/bin/sh # auto-generated by StaticRoute service (utility.py) # NOTE: this service must be customized to be of any use # Below are samples that you can uncomment and edit. #ip route add 10.9.8.0/24 via 100.64.0.1 #ip route add 10.9.8.0/24 via 162.120.0.1
ip route add 100.64.1.0/24 via 162.120.0.2 dev eth1

#!/bin/sh # auto-generated by StaticRoute service (utility.py) # NOTE: this service must be customized to be of any use # Below are samples that you can uncomment and edit. #ip route add 10.9.8.0/24 via 162.120.0.1
ip route add 100.64.0.0/24 via 162.120.0.1 dev eth0

#!/bin/sh # auto-generated by StaticRoute service (utility.py) # NOTE: this service must be customized to be of any use # Below are samples that you can uncomment and edit.
#ip route add 3ffe:4::/64 via 2001:1::1
ip route add default via 100.64.1.1 dev eth0
ip tunnel add tnl mode sit local 100.64.1.2 remote 100.64.0.2 dev eth0 sudo ip link set tnl up ip -6 route add default dev tnl
